notes: Active - extracts the username from the '/av/{username}/' URL path, then calls https://api.imvu.com/user?username=... and builds a draggable modal with the returned profile fields (display name, legacy CID, created date, etc.), an avatar preview, and status badges. target_url uses IMVU's official 'Project Lab' avatar/profile page as a stable public example - if it 404s in CI, any '/next/av/{user}/' page with a real IMVU username should work.

checks.comment: Draggable modal header should appear once the IMVU API response is rendered
Confirm the IMVU user API was called
